name: Monterey Corn
recipeIngredient: 1/8 tsp black pepper (1/4 tsp if preferred)
1 bag frozen whole kernel corn (or 1 lb.)
1 tsp salt (less if using canned corn)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat margarine in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped green pepper and onion; sauté until tender.
3. Stir in the corn, salt, black pepper, and water; cover and simmer on low heat, stirring occasionally, until the corn is cooked through.
